parameters.url: ={{ 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/' + encodeURIComponent($node['Set Config'].json.mailbox_user) + '/mailFolders/' + encodeURIComponent($node['Set Config'].json.agenda_folder_id) + '/messages?$top=' + $node['Set Config'].json.poll_top + '&$orderby=' + encodeURIComponent('receivedDateTime desc') + '&$select=' + encodeURIComponent('id,internetMessageId,subject,from,receivedDateTime,bodyPreview,body,hasAttachments,isRead') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Combine Card Context').item.json || {};
return [{ json: { ...item, deck_label_ids: [item.label_id] } }];

const item = $('After Category Label').item.json || {};
return [{ json: { ...item, deck_label_ids: [item.label_id, item.review_label_id], result: 'success_with_review_flag' } }];

const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { result: item.result || 'success_clean', graph_message_id: item.source_message_id, internet_message_id: item.internet_message_id || '', deck_card_id: item.deck_card_id, deck_stack_id: item.deck_stack_id, deck_label_ids: item.deck_label_ids || [], imported_at: item.imported_at, title: item.title, category: item.category } }];

const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { result: 'duplicate_skip', graph_message_id: item.source_message_id, internet_message_id: item.internet_message_id || '', duplicate_known_at: item.duplicate_known_at || '', imported_at: item.imported_at, title: item.title, category: item.category } }];

const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { result: 'error_invalid_message', graph_message_id: item.source_message_id || '', internet_message_id: item.internet_message_id || '', error_message: 'Pflichtfelder source_message_id oder receivedDateTime fehlen', imported_at: item.imported_at || new Date().toISOString(), title: item.title || 'Ohne Betreff' } }];
